rulings.Case Title: MICHELE WALKER VS. ELLEN SOTOS MCCOY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
rulings.Rulings: ON CALENDAR FOR THURSDAY, OCTOBER 5, 2006. DEFENDANTS ELLEN MCCOY AND CAROL YOUNGE'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED AS TO PUNITIVE DAMAGES BURDEN SHIFTED BY DEFENDANT BY DECLARATION AS TO LACK OF CONSUMPTION OF ALCOHOL, LIGHT WAS GREEN NORMALCY OF TRIP, ETC. PLAINTIFF FAILS TO CREATE TRIABLE ISSUE BY SHOWING OPPRESSION, FRAUD OR MALICE, MUST BE MORE THAN RUNNING RED LIGHT ON DRY DAY WITH PEDESTRIAN AROUND. =(302/AJR/KD)
